features: ⭐️【Car Air Freshener Replacement Kit】Includes 8 packs of car perfume replacement pads, car aromatherapy supplement tablets is individually sealed packaging, can be stored for a long time. We have 4 different scents, ocean, cologne, osmanthus and jasmine, you can choose different scents according to your needs.

🚚【Safe to Use】The car air outlet air freshener is equipped with natural plant extract aromatherapy chips, which can evaporate without any pollution, harmless, and can soothe emotions. Easy to replace, fresh and long-lasting fragrance, each flavor can add to the icing on the cake of your car.

💩【Eliminates Odors】Bad smells from smoke, pets, mold, and food are effectively removed, releasing a fresh new car smell in minutes. After the natural volatilization is complete, you can add your favorite flavor. Car aromatherapy tablets make you gradually relax and bring you a pleasant mood.

🔧【Easy Installation】Put 1 aromatherapy tablet into our cute bear diffuser box, close and clip on the air outlet. Doesn't need to be activated in it to be scented naturally. The operation is simple and convenient, allowing you to easily have chic aromatherapy decorations.

🚗【Usage Scenarios】Cartoon Bear Pilot Car Air Freshener is gentle and cleans the air, suitable for all ages. It is used for car air outlet clip replacements, air outlet air freshener refills, and car aromatherapy replacement cartridges. Suitable for all kinds of car air outlets, pendants and decorations.
description: Features: Aroma, Deodorant These car air freshener refills come in 4 different scents. You can choose different fragrances according to your needs.
